Our Legacy

Born From Vision. Built For Generations.

"NIVVYAASAA isn't simply a construction company — it is a luxury development house creating iconic spaces that appreciate in value and prestige over time."

Founded in 2023 in Bangalore, Karnataka, NIVVYAASAA Builders & Developers Pvt Ltd® was born from a singular belief: that the homes and landmarks we build today will define the legacy of families and cities tomorrow.

Led by civil engineers and visionary developers, we bring together technical precision and aesthetic vision in every project — from luxury residences to government infrastructure. Every detail refined. Every material chosen. All in service of one commitment: to craft spaces that outlast their era.

Philosophy

We design from the inside out — the experience of inhabiting a space is crafted before the first structural decision is made.

Materials

Only premium-grade materials from certified vendors. Every specification meets or exceeds IS standards — no compromises, ever.

Process

100% transparent documentation, legal clarity on every title, and project management engineered for on-time, on-budget delivery.

Vision

To become the most trusted luxury development brand in South India — setting the benchmark for construction excellence in Karnataka.

Redefining Luxury

Architecture As Legacy

Every NIVVYAASAA development is conceived as a statement — a landmark that commands the skyline and holds its prestige for generations.

Begin Your Legacy
Signature Services

Crafted for the Discerning Few

From ground-breaking to handover, NIVVYAASAA offers a complete spectrum of construction and development solutions — every service engineered to deliver an experience as exceptional as the property itself.

🏗️

Real Estate Development

End-to-end development from site identification and feasibility to construction and handover — fully managed under one roof.

03

Commercial Construction

Office buildings, retail complexes, and commercial developments built to perform and make a statement for decades.

04

05
📐

Architectural Design

Design solutions that merge international sensibility with Karnataka's spatial vocabulary — buildings of lasting distinction.

06

Government PWD Works

Infrastructure projects executed with full regulatory compliance, proper documentation, and professional site management.

07
🗺️

Layout Development

Premium layout development with planned infrastructure, legal title clearance, and full RERA compliance from day one.

08

Visionary Leadership

The Minds Behind NIVVYAASAA

Deekshith N

Director & Founder · NIVVYAASAA Builders®
BE Civil Engineer Construction Real Estate Development

As a BE Civil Engineer with hands-on expertise spanning construction management, real estate development, and infrastructure delivery, Deekshith N founded NIVVYAASAA with a singular purpose: to build spaces that outlast their era. His uncompromising approach — premium materials, transparent processes, legal clarity, and on-time delivery — defines every NIVVYAASAA project.

Narasimha Murthy M C

Director & Co-Founder · NIVVYAASAA Builders®
Development Strategy Real Estate Investment Operations

Narasimha Murthy M C brings strategic vision and deep operational expertise to NIVVYAASAA. With a background in real estate development and investment strategy, he has been instrumental in shaping the company's growth trajectory — from its founding in 2023 to its emergence as one of Karnataka's most ambitious luxury development firms. His focus on transparent investor relations and long-term value creation defines NIVVYAASAA's investment philosophy.

"
"True luxury is not measured by cost, but by the legacy it leaves behind."
— The Founders, NIVVYAASAA®
Investment

Invest With NIVVYAASAA

Most builders ask you to buy a property. We invite you to partner in a legacy.

NIVVYAASAA offers curated investment propositions for high-net-worth individuals and institutional investors seeking transparent, land-backed returns with a development team that brings real engineering expertise to every project.

From project-based investment to premium land development — our documentation is watertight, titles are clean, and our track record is built on delivery.

Explore Opportunities
💼

Project Investment

Invest in specific development projects with clearly defined timelines, returns, and clean exit structures.

📋

Transparent Docs

Complete legal title verification, RERA-registered documents, and clear profit-sharing agreements on every investment.

🤝

Profit Sharing

Partner with NIVVYAASAA on development projects and share in the upside — structured for both short and long-term investors.

🗺️

Land Development

RERA-approved layout projects in high-growth corridors around Bangalore and Tumkur with strong appreciation fundamentals.

Why Elite Clients Choose Us

The NIVVYAASAA Difference

01
🏅

Founded 2023 · Vision-Led

A fresh force in luxury real estate built with decade-old ambition and the energy of a new generation committed to excellence.

02
🔩

Civil Engineering Depth

Our BE Civil Engineering leadership means structural challenges are solved at design stage — saving time, money, and quality compromises.

03
📄

Radical Transparency

No hidden costs. No surprises. Every contract, specification, and milestone is documented and shared with clients in real time.

04
🏗️

Premium Standards Only

We source exclusively from certified vendors. What we specify in design is exactly what gets built on site — no substitutions.

05
🎯

End-to-End Delivery

From concept to handover and beyond — NIVVYAASAA manages every stage so clients experience seamless, stress-free delivery.

06
🏛️

Government Capability

Registered for PWD and infrastructure works — a mark of credibility, technical compliance, and the highest documentation standards.
